title: Why Your Production RAG System Slowly Gets Worse
abstract: Is your RAG system slowing down? Don't blame the machine—give it a good clean! Just like a cluttered closet with too many clothes, your RAG system can become disorganized. Use this tool to refresh and optimize your system so it runs smoothly again and stays efficient amid increasing data.
abstract_zh: 你是不是觉得你的RAG系统越来越慢了？这不怪机器，是时候给它来个大扫除了！就像你的衣柜，衣服越来越多，整理得乱七八糟，穿什么都找不到。赶紧试试这个工具吧，让你的RAG系统恢复活力，运行流畅，再也不怕被数据淹没了！
